feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Apps
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Apps Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How we can filter Odata data in SAP BUILD APP.
entry.content:
I got data in SAP BUILD APP with Odata URL. But now I want to know how we can filter only selected
data (UserID, Employee Name) in SAP BUILD APP.

entry.title: Re: CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) Error in SAP Bui...
entry.content:
Hi @_Aman_ 

It looks like the CORS error might be due to an issue with the link you’re using, as it points to a cloud-hosted application. I recommend setting up SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform) destinations to manage connections more securely and avoid CORS issues.

  1. Make sure your destination is correctly set with the proper URL and authentication.
  2. Use transaction code RZ10 to configure CORS settings in your S/4HANA system, allowing your OData API to accept requests from your application.
  3. If you manage the OData service, make sure the necessary CORS headers are included.

Testing through SAP Build Apps after these changes should help. Let me know if you need further assistance!

entry.title: how to Dump files in AWS S3 from SAP business Process Automation
entry.content:
I am working on a solution where I need to upload files from SAP Build Process Automation (SAP BPA) to Amazon S3. I have already created a flow to download files from an SAP BPA screen flow, but I am facing issues connecting to S3. SAP BPA does not provide a native way to directly connect to S3, and I am unable to use Basic Authentication via SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI). Is there a way to achieve this integration, or would another approach be necessary

SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition SAP Business Workflow  SAP Business Process Automation by Redwood SAP Business Process Management SAP Build SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: How to Convert Base64 Text to Image using SAP Build Apps?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want to know how to convert a Base64 encoded text into an image using SAP Build Apps. This is a crucial part of my current project, and I’m looking for detailed guidance on how to implement this functionality effectively.

If anyone has experience with this or can refer to any blogs, tutorials, or documentation that cover this topic, your assistance would be greatly appreciated. Specific examples or step-by-step instructions would be incredibly helpful!

Thank you in advance for your support and insights!
Regards,
Sundar

entry.title: Remove the open page animation
entry.content: I implemented a custom tab bar, and I want to move between the tabs without open page animation. How can I use the 'Open page' or 'Replace page' without the slide transition effect?

entry.title: Getting issue in running automation
entry.content:
i have already updated the agent's sdk version. I even tried with the same version given still every time getting same issue

 

SAP Build SAP Build Process Automation SAP Workforce Performance Builder, desktop edition# SAP Process Integration

entry.title: Data Variables' filter conditions do not work
entry.content:
Hi SAP Build Apps' Team

The data variables' filter conditions do not work at all. Also it does not take different comparison values when configuring multiple data variables from one data source.

@EsmeeX if you could please check

entry.title: Need advice to make a GET authentication API work in iRPA
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if you could give me a quick hand regarding a pretty straight-forward API call that I have been trying to make in an automation in iRPA for a couple of days now. The problematic API is API 1 (API 2 is working like a charm in iRPA), see details as below.

The authentication process consists in calling two APIs consecutively:

  1. API 1: method GET, no parameter, returns a token named XSRF-TOKEN within the response cookie that I need to retrieve in order to use it in:

  2. API 2: method POST, header authorization encoded in base 64 with username and password, X-Xsrf-Token retrieved in API 1. Returns a bearer in response header.

API 1 is working in Postman but somehow I can't make it function in iRPA.

These are some of my attempts (code as part of a custom script), some of them might be awkward (sorry):

a.

 

return {
method: 'GET',
url:'https://sandbox.entreprises.xxxx.gouv.fr/api/init',
responseType: 'json',
resolveBodyOnly: false
headers:{
}
};

 

=> Response code 500 (Internal Servor Error)

b. (N.B.: that one was recommended by SAP Web services Best Practices, see screenshot below)

 

return {
method: 'GET',
url: 'https://sandbox.entreprises.xxxx.gouv.fr/api/init' ,
responseType:'json',
resolveBodyOnly: false
};

 

=> Response code 500 (Internal Servor Error)

c. (this is the one I use for API 2, which is working, thought I would try the same for API 1)

 

const options = {
resolveBodyOnly : false,
responseType: 'json',
url: 'https://sandbox.entreprises.xxxx.gouv.fr/api/init',
method: 'GET',
headers: {
'Accept' : 'application/json',
'Content-Type': 'application/json',
}
};

const response = await irpa_core.request.call(options);
return response.headers;

 

=> Response code 500 (Internal Servor Error)

d.

 

async function fetchToken () {
const options = {
resolveBodyOnly : true,
responseType: 'json',
url: 'https://sandbox.entreprises.xxxx.gouv.fr/api/init',
method: 'GET',
headers: {
'Accept' : 'application/json',
'Content-Type': 'application/json',
'XSRF-TOKEN': 'fetch'
}
};
const response = await irpa_core.request.call(options);
return response;

 

=> Response code 500 (Internal Servor Error)

It is not the first time I handle API calls in SAP iRPA, and it always succeeded even with more complex ones. The irony of this being that I managed to make the API 2 work in iRPA.

Automation in itself is also quite simple: custom script (with no input) => call web service => create variable. See here:

Note that I already read detailed blogs, tutorials and videos (for which I am very grateful) before contacting you. I’m kind of disarmed in front of something that should supposedly be simple to run…

Would you have any clue how to make this work please?

Thanks beforehand for your time and I’m looking forward to reading you.

Kind regards,

LM.

entry.title: SAP BTP Build Toggle one Item on screen does not work and Workflow activation
entry.content:
Hi To all,

Im following  @XavierPicquart  blogs where CALM Requirements from one selected CALM Project  should be selected/approved in the SAP Build/Process Automation .

In the first screen (project selection)  Im selecting a project from where I will get list of project Requirements . and this works ok. 

In the second "Requirements Selection " screen (see below) I got list of Project  Requirements listed  and then by toggling one requirement I should start process of approval which will happen in the SAP Business Process Automation.

I have 2 Problems:

  1. In requirements Screen I was not able to select only one Requirements , toggling one Req. all Req. will become  active as well. Not possible to toggle only one!? 
  2. After selecting proper Requirements, approval  Workflow should be started but nothing is happening ?

 

Example

Please advise what to do and where to look.

 

Thank you 

BM

entry.title: Any luck ? Same issue for me
entry.content: Any luck? Same issue for me . In fact all the app variables also looses data after refresh

entry.title: How to save Odata data in SAP BUILD APP in PDF format.
entry.content:
I am created a project in SAP Build App and data in coming from Odata link in UI also.
Now, I want to save that data in PDF format.

entry.title: D3js google charts not rendering
entry.content: For some reason with the new updates the D3js google charts not rendering anymore, the graphs are not building. Anyone else has this issue?

entry.title: Issues with Barcode exercise
entry.content:
Hi,

I am learning with the exercise in the following URL:
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/compose-and-automate-with-sap-build-the-no-code-way/creating-a-first-application-with-sap-build-apps
The exercise only works in SAP Education simulation mode. When I try this with my SAP Build trial - 
I use a test account created 3 weeks ago during teched 24 virtual,
lobby URL: https://ge-buildapps-eu10.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/lobby

the UIs and options offered differ from the downloaded PDF, URL:
https://education.hana.ondemand.com/education/pub/mmcp/project/PR_3B7D396E70C5C8B2/hands_on.pdf
Step 49, Choose REST API direct integration, is not offered in the UI. What I see instead is 
Universal REST API integration. Also, at the tool selection box at the top, I do not see "Data", but "Integration" instead. See attached screenshots. While these changes appear cosmetic at first, in the following steps 52ff, the instructions cannot be followed anymore because described fields to be populated don't exist and options to choose from do not exist. So it appears the learning journey is not reflecting the reality of the current system anymore.

Any ideas what to do here?

Thanks and best regards,

Christian

entry.title: Error: Multiple identifiers not supported for OnDevice driver
entry.content:
I am receiving the following error when trying to query an entity from my odata service: 

Error: Multiple identifiers not supported for OnDevice driver

This is how my datastructure looks like (it's from the official SAP Asset Performance Management API)

 

Has any one ever faced this error before and knows a way to overcome it?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to Manage Startup page in SAP BUILD APP
entry.content:
Dear All,

i am new with SAP Build App. There are many pages such as FlashScreen, LoginScreen, HomeScreen. i would like to set up startup page on FlashScreen, but i couldn't find the way to do, please kindly advise.

thanks,

Ratana

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Access Denied
entry.content:
In my BTP Trail account, through the booster I have setup the SAP Build apps and activated User account also. But when I opened the SAP Build apps its saying access denied. 

Please help me to fix this issue.

entry.title: SAP Build App Combo box Usage
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying a simple use case of to display Product Description in the Combo box field by integrating with API "API_PRODUCT_SRV". I can show Product 

 

But while trying the formula unable to show Product Description (associated entity) in Combo box. Kindly Suggest

Regards,

Anam

entry.title: SAP Build App - Multiple Dates Field alignment
entry.content:
Hi,

I've multiple Dates field in the Page and with the help of Z index overlapping issue is resolved. However until enough gap is maintained in right and bottom spacing the dates are not entirely visible. Kindly suggest.

Regards,

Anam

entry.title: Obtain role collection for user in SAP Build Apps.
entry.content:
How do I get role collection assigned to a user in sap build apps. 

Would like to know how to assign scope to a user. All I get is OpenID as the output.

entry.title: SAP build Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500
entry.content:
when opening up SAP build and try to start a new project, I do get the following error

"Something went wrong"
Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 ()Understand this errorAI
callback:1
Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 ()

my guess - seems an issue with the "Custom Identity Provider for Applications" / trust configuration but I do not know how to solve, any ideas?
